Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 14}If you {f 0 1 2}Shift{f 0 1 27} during a 1 More, you can pass the chance for an extra attack to another party member. Press {f 1 3 115} to hand over the turn to someone else. Make use of everyone's strengths to battle efficiently.[n]{f 1 1}
